message:
feat: memory pressure engine with tier-based actions (wa-2ahu0)

Add memory_pressure module with:
- MemoryPressureTier enum (Green/Yellow/Orange/Red)
- MemoryAction enum for tier-based responses (compress, evict, emergency)
- MemoryPressureMonitor with async sampling loop
- Linux: /proc/meminfo parser for total/available memory
- macOS: sysctl hw.memsize + vm_stat for safe memory stats
- PaneMemoryInfo for per-pane memory tracking
- 21 tests passing

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
